---
image: /images/meaghan2.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/MeaghanClark

---

## Meaghan I. Clark 

Hello! I am currently an NSF Postdoctoral Scholar at University of California, Santa Cruz. I'm working in the [Global Change Research Group](https://globalchange.sites.ucsc.edu/) to learn about evolutionary resiliency of giant kelp to it's rapidly changing environment.  

I completed my PhD at Michigan State University working with Drs. [Gideon Bradburd](http://www.genescape.org/)
 and [Sarah Fitzpatrick](http://swfitz.com/). I received my master's with [Dr. Jeanne Robertson](https://jrobertsonlab.wordpress.com/) at California State University Northridge. I study small populations, and how they have persisted in the face of anthropogenic changes.
